rationale: The user 'host-01\user-01' executed 'netsh.exe' to add a new inbound firewall rule allowing TCP traffic on port 450 (A0, EV-001). Shortly after, the same user deleted this rule (EV-003, EV-004). This rapid creation and deletion of a firewall rule is suspicious behavior, potentially indicating an attempt to temporarily open a port for malicious activity and then cover tracks.
